allow: Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="use Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\DB; $r = DB::selectOne\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM appointments WHERE expiration_date IS NOT NULL''\); echo ''Filled: ''.$r->cnt;")

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo DB::selectOne\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM appointments WHERE expiration_date IS NOT NULL''\)->cnt.'' filled, ''.DB::selectOne\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM appointments WHERE expiration_date IS NULL''\)->cnt.'' still null'';")
